languages.text: "Надеешься на примирение? Тщетно. Но да, мне есть, что спросить".
"You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."
languages.original_text: "Надеешься на примирение? Тщетно. Но да, мне есть, что спросить".

traits.locale_text: "You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."
"You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."
"You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."
"You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."
"You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."

languages.text: 「赦しを望むのか？赦しは得られない。それでも、君に問いたいことがある。」
languages.original_text: "You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."

traits.locale_text: 「赦しを望むのか？赦しは得られない。それでも、君に問いたいことがある。」

languages.text: “你指望宽恕？别指望了。不过，我确实有几个问题要问你。”
languages.original_text: "You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."

traits.locale_text: “你指望宽恕？别指望了。不过，我确实有几个问题要问你。”

languages.text: "Bağışlanmayı mı umuyorsun? Öyle bir şey olmayacak. Yine de sana sormam gereken sorular var."
languages.original_text: "You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."

traits.locale_text: "Bağışlanmayı mı umuyorsun? Öyle bir şey olmayacak. Yine de sana sormam gereken sorular var."

languages.text: «¿Espera alcanzar el perdón? Imposible. Sin embargo, tengo preguntas para usted».
languages.original_text: "You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."

traits.locale_text: «¿Espera alcanzar el perdón? Imposible. Sin embargo, tengo preguntas para usted».

languages.text: « Vous espérez mon pardon ? Vous ne l'aurez pas. J'ai toutefois quelques questions à vous poser. »
languages.original_text: "You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."

traits.locale_text: « Vous espérez mon pardon ? Vous ne l'aurez pas. J'ai toutefois quelques questions à vous poser. »

languages.text: "Ihr hofft auf Gnade? Die werdet Ihr nicht bekommen. Ich habe allerdings einige Fragen an Euch."
languages.original_text: "You hope for pardon? You will find none. Nevertheless, I have some questions to ask you."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr hofft auf Gnade? Die werdet Ihr nicht bekommen. Ich habe allerdings einige Fragen an Euch."
